'''âzh-d-m''' ('''kazhadam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:histolyze|histolyze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:histolyze|histolyze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-d-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazhadam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhadam|thizhadam]] || [[word:jizhadam|jizhadam]] || [[word:shizhadam|shizhadam]] || [[word:kizhadam|kizhadam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhadam|thuthuzhadam]] || [[word:jujuzhadam|jujuzhadam]] || [[word:shushuzhadam|shushuzhadam]] || [[word:kukuzhadam|kukuzhadam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhadam|thuzhadam]] || [[word:juzhadam|juzhadam]] || [[word:shuzhadam|shuzhadam]] || [[word:kuzhadam|kuzhadam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhadam|thuzhadam]] || [[word:juzhadam|juzhadam]] || [[word:shuzhadam|shuzhadam]] || [[word:kuzhadam|kuzhadam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhadam|thezhadam]] || [[word:jezhadam|jezhadam]] || [[word:shezhadam|shezhadam]] || [[word:kezhadam|kezhadam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhadam|thothozhadam]] || [[word:jojozhadam|jojozhadam]] || [[word:shoshozhadam|shoshozhadam]] || [[word:kokozhadam|kokozhadam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhadam|thozhadam]] || [[word:jozhadam|jozhadam]] || [[word:shozhadam|shozhadam]] || [[word:kozhadam|kozhadam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhadam|thozhadam]] || [[word:jozhadam|jozhadam]] || [[word:shozhadam|shozhadam]] || [[word:kozhadam|kozhadam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhadam|thĂŠzhadam]] || [[word:jĂŠzhadam|jĂŠzhadam]] || [[word:shĂŠzhadam|shĂŠzhadam]] || [[word:kĂŠzhadam|kĂŠzhadam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhadam|thathazhadam]] || [[word:jajazhadam|jajazhadam]] || [[word:shashazhadam|shashazhadam]] || [[word:kakazhadam|kakazhadam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhadam|thazhadam]] || [[word:jazhadam|jazhadam]] || [[word:shazhadam|shazhadam]] || [[word:kazhadam|kazhadam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhadam|thazhadam]] || [[word:jazhadam|jazhadam]] || [[word:shazhadam|shazhadam]] || [[word:kazhadam|kazhadam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhadam|shazhadam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhadam|goshazhadam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhadam|gokishazhadam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhadamnĂŒ|shazhadamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadamnknĂŒ|goshazhadamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadamnĂŒ|gokishazhadamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhadamshĂ«|shazhadamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkshĂ«|goshazhadamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhadamshĂ«|gokishazhadamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadamro|shazhadamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkro|goshazhadamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadamro|gokishazhadamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadamu|shazhadamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkmu|goshazhadamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadamu|gokishazhadamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhadamsher|shazhadamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhadamnksher|goshazhadamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhadamsher|gokishazhadamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhadamng|shazhadamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkng|goshazhadamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhadamng|gokishazhadamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhadamya|shazhadamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkya|goshazhadamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhadamya|gokishazhadamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhadamyam|shazhadamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkyam|goshazhadamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhadamyam|gokishazhadamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadamnĂŒshĂ«|shazhadamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhadamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhadamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadamnĂŒro|shazhadamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadamnknĂŒro|goshazhadamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadamnĂŒro|gokishazhadamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadamnĂŒmu|shazhadamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadamnknĂŒmu|goshazhadamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadamnĂŒmu|gokishazhadamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadamshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhadamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhadamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhadamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadamshĂ«ro|shazhadamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkshĂ«ro|goshazhadamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadamshĂ«ro|gokishazhadamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadamshĂ«mu|shazhadamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkshĂ«mu|goshazhadamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadamshĂ«mu|gokishazhadamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadamronĂŒ|shazhadamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkronĂŒ|goshazhadamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadamronĂŒ|gokishazhadamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadamroshĂ«|shazhadamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkroshĂ«|goshazhadamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadamroshĂ«|gokishazhadamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhadamromu|shazhadamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkromu|goshazhadamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhadamromu|gokishazhadamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhadamunĂŒ|shazhadamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkmunĂŒ|goshazhadamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhadamunĂŒ|gokishazhadamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhadamushĂ«|shazhadamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkmushĂ«|goshazhadamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhadamushĂ«|gokishazhadamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhadamuro|shazhadamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhadamnkmuro|goshazhadamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhadamuro|gokishazhadamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
